name: First Observed Remote Admin Tool On A Host
description: Uses the new_terms rule type to alert the first time a known remote-administration or remote-access tool executable name is observed running on a given host over the lookback window. Useful for catching attacker-introduced RMM tooling.
query: event.category : "process" and process.name : ("anydesk.exe" or "teamviewer.exe" or "psexec.exe" or "atera_agent.exe" or "screenconnect.clientservice.exe")
false_positives: IT may legitimately deploy a new RMM tool fleet-wide; expect a burst of first-seen alerts during a sanctioned rollout.
